suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Validate mission feature skill references against available skills/droids during planning to prevent worker invocation mismatches.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviewer observation noted feature metadata references to `worker` while repo-level skill files are absent, which has caused direct invocation failures in past transcripts.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add `.factory/library/architecture.md` immediately based only on review-time absence.
